intents.name: Welcome
responses: Hello! Welcome to Sadie's Alterations. How can I assist you today?
Hi! Welcome to Sadie's Alterations chatbot. Would you like to know about our business hours, location, or services?

intents.name: Business_Hours
training_phrases: What time do you open on weekdays?
responses:
Sadie's Alterations business hours are:
- Monday - Friday: 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM
- We are closed on Sundays and public holidays.

intents.name: Location
responses: Sadie's Alterations is located at 7612 Wydown Blvd, Clayton, MO, 63105. Ample parking is available nearby. For our location: [Google Maps](https://www.google.com.tr/maps/place/7612+Wydown+Blvd,+Clayton,+MO+63105,+Amerika+Birle%C5%9Fik+Devletleri/@38.6428336,-90.3362954,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x87d8cad76810eb6b:0xcf2776f35bdc85d8!8m2!3d38.6428294!4d-90.3337205!16s%2Fg%2F11c5d33vx6?hl=tr&entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI0MDkyNS4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D)

intents.name: Contact_Info
training_phrases: Do you have an email address?
responses: You can email us at info@sadiesalteration.com or call us at 314-727-9976.

intents.name: General_Services
training_phrases: What kind of alterations do you do?
responses: At Sadie's Alterations, we offer all kinds of textile and fabric alteration services. We refresh your wardrobe with our comprehensive clothing repair services. You can consult us for all your fabric-related needs. We specialize in pant hemming, jacket tapering, dress length adjustments, zipper replacements, and much more.

intents.name: About_Us
training_phrases: Can I get information about you?
How long have you been in business?
responses: Sadie's Alterations is a family-owned and operated tailoring shop with over 20 years of experience. We reflect our commitment to excellence in every stitch, passing down the art of tailoring from generation to generation. Customer satisfaction is paramount to us. Our expert tailors handle every piece with precision and care.

intents.name: Pricing_General
training_phrases: What is the cost of an alteration?
Do you have a price list?
responses: The cost of alterations varies depending on the complexity of the work, the type of fabric, and the time required. For the most accurate pricing, we recommend bringing your garment to our shop for a free consultation with our experts. With our transparent pricing policy, we will provide you with a clear price before starting any work.

intents.name: Turnaround_Time
training_phrases: When can I pick up my item?
responses: General alterations usually take 1 to 2 weeks. However, this can vary depending on our workload and the detail of the alteration. For urgent requests, please contact us, and we will do our best to assist you. Special alterations like wedding dresses may take longer, so we advise coming in early.

intents.name: Appointment_Needed
training_phrases: Can I walk in without an appointment?
responses: We strongly recommend making an appointment. When you schedule an appointment, our experts will have a dedicated time slot to meet with you one-on-one. We do accept walk-ins, but customers with appointments are given priority, so there might be a waiting period.

intents.name: Suit_Alterations
responses: Yes, we specialize in suit alterations. We offer a wide range of services, from adjusting jacket sleeve lengths and shortening pant hems to completely deconstructing and recutting your suit to fit your body perfectly. We meticulously handle every detail to ensure your suit fits you impeccably. Whether you desire a more modern cut or increased comfort, we provide custom solutions.

intents.name: Wedding_Dress_Alterations
training_phrases: Can you change the style of a wedding dress?
responses: We ensure your wedding dress is flawless for your special day. While wedding dress alterations are similar to other dress alterations, we stand out with our attention to detail. We can adjust the length, size, and even change the style of your wedding dress. Our expert tailors will help you achieve your dream look while preserving the original details. Please remember to schedule your appointment early.

intents.name: Vintage_Clothing_Alterations
responses: Absolutely! We give new life to your old or vintage clothes that have been sitting in your wardrobe, waiting to be worn again. With simple touches like narrowing shoulders, tapering pants, or taking in the sides, we can completely transform the look of your garments. If you have concerns about the fabric's condition, our experts will provide the best advice.

intents.name: Dress_Enlargement
training_phrases: Can you make a dress bigger?
What if there isn't enough fabric?
How to enlarge a tight dress?
responses: We offer creative solutions to enlarge your dress. Even if there isn't enough fabric, we can add stylish new panels or use corset-style lacing details to provide the comfort and elegance you need. We tailor your dress to fit you perfectly with custom designs, without compromising its original look. Visit us for a free consultation.

intents.name: Jeans_Repair
responses: Yes, jeans repair is one of our most common services. We give your jeans a new lease on life by repairing tears, especially in the crotch or thigh area. With our patching craftsmanship, the repaired area becomes almost unnoticeable. Don't throw away your torn jeans; bring them to us, and we'll renew them for you.

intents.name: Social_Media
training_phrases: Do you have social media accounts?
Do you have a Facebook page?
Do you have a Twitter account?
responses:
Yes, you can follow us on social media:
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com)
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com)
- [Twitter](https://www.twitter.com)

intents.name: Fallback
responses: I'm sorry, I didn't quite understand your question. Would you like to know about our business hours, location, contact information, or services? Or perhaps I can help with a specific alteration like pants, jackets, or wedding dresses?
I couldn't understand how I can assist you with this. Could you please rephrase your question more clearly?
